text: The balance sheet reflects a conservative capital structure with strong liquidity positioning. As of Q4 2026, the current ratio stood at 3.91, indicating ample short-term liquidity coverage [fc6898e7-0436-452a-b590-9dcb2bcb2d1d]. Total debt was $11,412,000,000 against stockholders' equity of $157,293,000,000, yielding a debt-to-equity ratio of 0.07 [4bc124d0-55c5-43b2-8ab4-271e8fceebfa][e377f583-1e0e-4775-a1f9-d8e3eb7738e7][329a2749-65f3-4d5f-b78e-9d344e984ed5]. Net debt was minimal at $807,000,000, suggesting the company maintains a nearly net-cash position [36dc1d31-f0f0-44e7-b628-679358946106].
